source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH LEADS_DATA AS (

	SELECT 	
		SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
		SUM(CAST(ApptSet AS INTEGER))as total_appt_set,
		SUM(CAST(Verified AS INTEGER))as total_leads_verified,
		SUM(CAST(Confirmed AS INTEGER))as total_leads_confirmed,
		SUM(CAST(Issued AS INTEGER))as total_leads_issued,
		SUM(CAST(NetIssued AS INTEGER))as total_net_issued,
		SUM(CAST(sat AS INTEGER))as total_leads_sat,
		SUM(CAST(sold AS INTEGER))as total_leads_sold,
		SUM(CAST(everset AS INTEGER))as total_leads_everset,
		SUM(CAST(eververified AS INTEGER))as total_leads_eververified,
		SUM(CAST(everissued AS INTEGER))as total_leads_everissued,
		SUM(CAST(evernetissued AS INTEGER))as total_leads_evernetissued,
		SUM(CAST(eversat AS INTEGER))as total_leads_eversat,
		SUM(CAST(everconfirmed AS INTEGER))as total_leads_everconfirmed,
		SUM(CASE WHEN disp.comments like '%Reset%' and disp.OkToReset = 1 THEN 1 
				 WHEN disp.comments like '%Reschedule%' and disp.OkToReset = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_resets

	FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD leads
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION disp on leads.DispositionID = disp.DispositionID
	WHERE EntryDate > DATEADD(year, -1, getdate())
	GROUP BY SalesRep1_EmployeeID

),
FACT_CALL as (
	SELECT 
		a.AgentEmployeeID,
		COUNT(CallID) Total_Calls,
		SUM(CASE WHEN CallResult = 'Appointment' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Total_Appt_Sets,
		SUM(CASE WHEN UNI_CallType = 'Connected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Total_Outbound,
		SUM(CASE WHEN CallType LIKE 'Inbound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Total_Inbound,
		SUM(CASE WHEN UNI_CallResult = 'Follow up Request' and cr.Pitched = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Total_Followup_Req,
		SUM(CASE WHEN UNI_CallResult = 'Follow up Complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Total_Followups, 
		SUM(CASE WHEN UNI_CallResult = 'Call Transfer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Total_Call_Transfers
	
	FROM EDW.FACT_CALL a
	LEFT JOIN EDW.dim_call_result cr on a.CallResultID = cr.CallResultID
	LEFT JOIN EDW.dim_call_type ct on a.CallTypeID = ct.CallTypeID
	WHERE a.calldate > DATEADD(year, -1, GETDATE())
	GROUP BY a.AgentEmployeeID
)



SELECT 
	emp.EmployeeID,
	MAX(CONCAT(emp.FirstName, ' ', emp.LastName)) as EmployeeName,
	MAX(CAST(emp.Setter as INTEGER)) as Setter,
	MAX(CAST(emp.Verifier as INTEGER)) as Verifier,
	MAX(CAST(emp.Confirmer as INTEGER)) as Confirmer,
	MAX(CAST(emp.Promoter as INTEGER)) as Promoter,
	MAX(CAST(emp.SalesRep as INTEGER)) as SalesRep,
	MAX(CAST(emp.Dialer as INTEGER)) as Dialer,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Calls,0)) Total_Calls,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Appt_Sets,0)) Total_Appt_Sets,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Outbound,0)) Total_Outbound,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Inbound,0)) Total_Inbound,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Followup_Req,0)) Total_Followup_Req,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Followups,0)) Total_Followups,
	MAX(COALESCE(a.Total_Call_Transfers,0)) Total_Call_Transfers,
	MAX(emp.Division) as Division,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_appt_set, 0))as total_leads_appt_set,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_verified, 0)) as total_leads_verified,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_confirmed, 0)) as total_leads_confirmed,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_issued, 0)) as total_leads_issued,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_net_issued, 0)) as total_net_issued,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_sat, 0)) as total_leads_sat,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_sold, 0)) as total_leads_sold,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_everset, 0)) as total_leads_everset,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_eververified, 0)) as total_leads_eververified,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_everissued, 0)) as total_leads_everissued,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_evernetissued, 0)) as total_leads_evernetissued,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_eversat, 0)) as total_leads_eversat,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_leads_everconfirmed, 0)) as total_leads_everconfirmed,
	MAX(COALESCE(leads.total_resets, 0)) as total_resets
	
	
FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE emp
LEFT JOIN FACT_CALL a ON emp.EmployeeID = a.AGENTEMPLOYEEID
LEFT JOIN LEADS_DATA leads ON emp.EmployeeID = leads.SalesRep1_EmployeeID
WHERE emp.Active = 1 
GROUP BY emp.EmployeeID;
